messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.refund.message: Refund will post to your account in 3-5 business days after your return is processed.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.refund.message1: Refund will post to your account in 3-5 business days once processing is complete.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.refund.message2: Refund will post to your account in 3-5 business days.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.retu: Please call customer service to complete this return.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.cust: A return specialist will contact you within 3 business days to provide you with expectations for your return and refund.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.cred: No action is needed from you.  You will receive a credit email with your refund details.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.unde: We are unable to deliver your items and they have been returned to the warehouse. You will receive an email with your refund details.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.hass: We have received your return and are processing it. Once the return is complete, you will receive an email containing your refund details.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.cust: You do not need to return the following item(s). You will receive a credit email with your refund details.
Keep product and use at your discretion or
Donate the product to a worthy cause or
Discard the product, if recyclable please dispose of correctly
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: We will be sending a driver to collect your items. The driver will arrive soon as the next business day from when you placed your return or upto 5 business days.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pack: Reuse your original box or any box suitable for shipping. Include any of the following in the box to expedite receiving your credit:
Printout of your return confirmation email
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: Leave the box where deliveries are typically made to your location. This could be the front door, side door. loading deck. or front desk of your building.

Your items will be picked up as early as the next business day after your return was placed between the hours of 9am to 5pm. If your return has not been picked up within 5 business days, please contact us for further assistance.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: To return your items, you will receive an email from pkinfo@ups.com with your UPS shipping label.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.refu: You will receive an email when Staples has issued your refund.
You will receive an email once your refund has been issued.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.
Send your box back to Staples using one of these shipping methods:
Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.

dummyKey.title: Scotch Foam Double-Sided Mounting Tape, 1" x 12.5 yds., Gray (4011-LONG)

restrictionDetails.description: Out of stock for delivery to your shipping location.

paragraph: Equipped with our powerful permanent adhesive, this double-sided tape defies gravity, holding an item up to 24 pounds. It's weather resistant for a long lasting bond, indoors and outdoors. So whether you’re mounting artwork in your new apartment, or adding wall organization to the garage, Scotch Extreme Double-Sided Mounting Tape does the job quickly, easily and without the hassle of tools.
bullets: Maximum Strength - Our strongest tape delivers a superior, conformable bond on contact
Intended for indoor and outdoor use
Holds up to 24 lb. with 3M industrial strength adhesive To hold 1 lb. use 2" To hold 24 lb. use 48"
Designed For: Painted Drywall, Painted/Finished Wood, Metal, Acrylic, Smooth Stone, and Painted Concrete
Application temperature 50°F to 100°F
Easy-to-apply design with no mess or tools
Use instead of nails or screws
Ensure your surface is smooth, clean and dry for the best bond
Great for do-it-yourself projects
Made in the USA with Globally Sourced Materials
Size: 1 in x 400 in Roll
Color: Black
headliner: For your toughest jobs, go for our strongest hold–Scotch Extreme Double-Sided Mounting Tape with its 3M industrial strength adhesive.

dummyKey.skuDescription: Scotch Foam DoubleSided Mounting Tape 1 x 125 yds Gray 4011LONG

Kennedy International Simplify Open Lid Storage Bin, Chocolate (25091-CHOCO-ST)~#|#~sp106730873_sc7

dummyKeySTORE.title: Kennedy International Simplify Open Lid Storage Bin, Chocolate (25091-CHOCO-ST)

paragraph: Keep your workstation or bookshelf organized with this woven strap storage bin. The large dimensions expand workstation storage space and accommodate plenty of accessories and personal items, and the durable polyester straps support heavy items without tearing. Integrated handles make carrying this Simplify large woven strap storage bin easy, and a fashionable yet professional appearance fits in with both home and office decor.
bullets: This storage bin organizer is a great accessory for all your home needs
Comes in chocolate color and made of sturdy plastic
Open storage bin allows for easy access to items
Dimensions: 10"H x 15"W x 13"D
Features durable wipe-clean woven plastic fabric strapping
Comes with two looping carrying handles for easy carrying
Includes epoxy-coated steel frame to help retain shape
Features lightweight design
headliner: Store clothes, books, and large office supplies with this Simplify large woven strap storage bin.

dummyKeySTORE.skuDescription: Kennedy International Simplify Open Lid Storage Bin Chocolate 25091CHOCOST

paragraph: Equipped with our powerful permanent adhesive, this double-sided tape defies gravity, holding an item up to 24 pounds. It's weather resistant for a long lasting bond, indoors and outdoors. So whether you’re mounting artwork in your new apartment, or adding wall organization to the garage, Scotch Extreme Double-Sided Mounting Tape does the job quickly, easily and without the hassle of tools.
bullets: Maximum Strength - Our strongest tape delivers a superior, conformable bond on contact
Intended for indoor and outdoor use
Holds up to 24 lb. with 3M industrial strength adhesive To hold 1 lb. use 2" To hold 24 lb. use 48"
Designed For: Painted Drywall, Painted/Finished Wood, Metal, Acrylic, Smooth Stone, and Painted Concrete
Application temperature 50°F to 100°F
Easy-to-apply design with no mess or tools
Use instead of nails or screws
Ensure your surface is smooth, clean and dry for the best bond
Great for do-it-yourself projects
Made in the USA with Globally Sourced Materials
Size: 1 in x 400 in Roll
Color: Black
headliner: For your toughest jobs, go for our strongest hold–Scotch Extreme Double-Sided Mounting Tape with its 3M industrial strength adhesive.

paragraph: Keep your workstation or bookshelf organized with this woven strap storage bin. The large dimensions expand workstation storage space and accommodate plenty of accessories and personal items, and the durable polyester straps support heavy items without tearing. Integrated handles make carrying this Simplify large woven strap storage bin easy, and a fashionable yet professional appearance fits in with both home and office decor.
bullets: This storage bin organizer is a great accessory for all your home needs
Comes in chocolate color and made of sturdy plastic
Open storage bin allows for easy access to items
Dimensions: 10"H x 15"W x 13"D
Features durable wipe-clean woven plastic fabric strapping
Comes with two looping carrying handles for easy carrying
Includes epoxy-coated steel frame to help retain shape
Features lightweight design
headliner: Store clothes, books, and large office supplies with this Simplify large woven strap storage bin.
